items.claim: Bashar has not recorded a finish since September 2023.
items.quote: he hasn't had a finish since September of 2023

items.claim: John Garza was knocked out by Gilberto Malera in 2024.
items.quote: He was KO'ed once, uh, and that came against Gilbert, uh, Gilberto Malera in 2024

items.claim: Damen Pinas has a 6-inch reach advantage over Caesar Almeida.
items.quote: Damen Pinas has a 6-in reach advantage.

items.claim: Damen Pinas lands 7.5 significant strikes per minute compared to 3.5 for Caesar Almeida.
items.quote: Pinas uh 7.5 significant strikes per minute to 3.5 for Almea.
the Baba Yaga aka Damen Pinz 100% takedown defense.

items.claim: Caesar Almeida's takedown defense is vulnerable to wrestlers, as evidenced by his loss to Cesari Alexi Chuck who landed six takedowns.
items.quote: Amita lost to Cesari Alexi Chuck by decision. Alexi Chuck landed six takedowns.

items.claim: Damen Pinas's cardio is a concern if the fight goes into the second and third rounds.
items.quote: if we go into the second and third round, that'll work against Damen Pasc because he likes to get finishes quickly.

items.claim: Wang Kong lands 6.2 significant strikes per minute compared to 3.9 for Tracy Cortez.
items.quote: 6.2 significant strikes per minute. That's pretty darn active. 3.9 for Cortez.

items.claim: Wang Kong has an 84% takedown defense rate.
Tracy Cortez averages two takedowns per three-round fight.
items.quote: she does get two over the course of three rounds on average.
